concerns.detail: Personal insults directed at critics including calling them a 'clown' (小丑🤡) and saying they 'bite randomly' (乱咬人)
concerns.excerpt: 小丑🤡一个，大家都不理你不代表你可以一直乱咬人

concerns.detail: Condescending personal attack characterizing critics as 'children' (孩子) who are 'mentally broken' (破防了) due to application failures
concerns.excerpt: 自己申请不好或者申请不上是不是破防了孩子

concerns.detail: Insulting rhetorical question asking if critics need parents to provide research ideas and papers
concerns.excerpt: 要不要给你找个爹妈送你idea和paper
